description: Sanitized 12x12 coefficient matrix for exact coupled solve fixture. Structurally equivalent to the scientific solve: full rank 12, well-conditioned, with nullity 0. The coefficient values are constructed to reproduce the same structural validation properties (Rank=12, nullity=0, unique solution with all-zero residuals) as the private 016 source. The RHS vector is constructed so that the known exact solution vector x = [1, 1, -2, -1, 3, 2, 2, 0, -1, -3, 1, -2] satisfies M·x = b with exact zero numerical error.
